chapter_title.en: Chapter 149 – The rights of the wife upon the husband

text: عَنْهُ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ فِي الضَّعِيفَيْنِ يَعْنِي بِذَلِكَ الْيَتِيمَ وَ النِّسَاءَ وَ إِنَّمَا هُنَّ عَوْرَةٌ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at Bin Mihran,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Fear Allah<sup>azwj</sup> regarding the weak ones, meaning by that the orphans, and the women rather are exposed’.
